item.title: Tiramisu рҹҚ«вҳ•пёҸ Ingredients For the Ladyfingers (Savoiardi)...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Tiramisu рҹҚ«вҳ•пёҸ Ingredients For the Ladyfingers (Savoiardi): Eggs вҖЁGranulated sugar вҖЁAP FlourвҖЁPowdered sugar (for dusting) Vanilla extract For the Espresso Soak/Mix: Fresh espresso вҖЁSugar NutmegвҖЁMarsala wine or dark rum (optional) For the filling: Egg yolksвҖЁGranulated sugarвҖЁMascarpone cheese вҖЁHeavy cream For finishing: Unsweetened cocoa powderвҖЁ
#tiramisu #dessert #baking #recipe #autumn

item.title: CHICKEN PARM SANDWICH рҹҘ– Ingredients For the chicken cutlets:в...
item.description:
View on TikTok


CHICKEN PARM SANDWICH рҹҘ– Ingredients For the chicken cutlets:вҖЁ2 boneless and skinless chicken breastsВ В  Kosher saltВ В  Freshly ground black pepperВ В  ВҪ cup all-purpose flourВ В  2 eggsВ В  ВҪ cup panko breadcrumbs + ВҪ cup Italian finely ground breadcrumbsВ В  в…“ cup finely grated ParmesanВ В  A few good glugs of olive oil and/or neutral oil for fryingВ В  в…“ cup potato starchВ В  ВҪ tablespoon garlic powderВ В  ВҪ tablespoon onion powderВ В  ВҪ tbs dried thyme For the tomato sauce: 3-4 tablespoons of olive oilвҖЁ2 garlic cloves, smashedвҖЁ1 (28 oz) can San Marzano tomatoesвҖЁSaltвҖЁFreshly ground black pepperвҖЁOptional: 1вҖ“2 teaspoons Calabrian chili paste or chopped Calabrian chilis For the tomato-garlic confit:вҖЁ1 pint of small tomatoes (such as cherry, grape, campari, datterini, or sun gold)вҖЁ1 head garlicвҖЁВҫ cup olive oilвҖЁKosher salt For the pesto:вҖЁ1 big old bunch of basilвҖЁ2-3 garlic clovesвҖЁВј c pine nuts вҖЁв…“ cup grated Parmigiano ReggianoвҖЁВј cup extra virgin olive oilвҖЁSaltВ  For the sandwich assembly:вҖЁBread of choiceвҖЁFresh mozzarellaвҖЁExtra Parmesan for topping Full recipe can be found on my substack, link in bio!
#chickenparm #sandwich #cooking

item.title: LAHMACUN Full recipe is on my substack link in bio! Ingredient...
item.description:
View on TikTok


LAHMACUN Full recipe is on my substack link in bio! Ingredients For the dough: All-purpose flour Salt Sugar Instant yeast Warm water Olive oil (optional) For the topping: Ground lamb or beef (or a combination of the two) Onion Garlic Tomato Red bell pepper or Turkish sweet pepper Flat-leaf parsley Tomato paste Red pepper paste (biber salГ§asДұ) Paprika Cumin Aleppo pepper (optional) Salt Black pepper Sumac onion topping: Red onion Tomatoes Fresh parsley Lemon juice
#summer #outdoorcooking #turkish #lahmacun

item.title: ROPA VIEJA рҹҮЁрҹҮә INGREDIENTS For the meat: -Flank or hanger s...
item.description:
View on TikTok


ROPA VIEJA рҹҮЁрҹҮә INGREDIENTS For the meat: -Flank or hanger steak -Red and green bell peppers -Onion -Tomato paste -Canned diced tomatoes -Salt -Black pepper -Cumin -Oregano -Smoked paprika -Dry white wine -Green olives (+ a little brine) -Cilantro -Bay leaf -Beef or vegetable stock вҖЁFor the black beans: -Black beans -Onion -Green bell pepper -Garlic -Salt -Cumin -Oregano -Bay leaf -Red wine vinegar For the plantains: -Fresh plantains -Neutral frying oil (I used avocado) -Salt (optional) For the rice: -Jasmine Rice -Salt -Onion -Red bell pepper *For the rice, I add a few large pieces of onion and bell pepper to infuse the flavor and then remove after cooking
#ropavieja #cubanfood #cooking #summer

item.title: FISH AND CHIPS рҹҗҹрҹҮ¬рҹҮ§ Ingredients For the fish: -Cod or ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


FISH AND CHIPS рҹҗҹрҹҮ¬рҹҮ§ Ingredients For the fish: -Cod or haddock -AP Flour -Salt -Black pepper -Neutral frying oil For the batter: -AP Flour -Potato starch -Baking powder -Salt -Paprika -Cayenne (optional) -Cold Beer (Pale ale, lager, or sparkling water) -Pinch of malt vinegar For the chips/fries: -Russet potatoes -Salt -Vinegar (optional during soaking) -Neutral frying oil (or other fat) -Malt vinegar For the tartar sauce: -Mayonnaise -Shallot -Parsley -Dill -Pickles / cornichons -Capers -Lemon juice -Dijon mustard For the peas: -Green peas -Butter -Salt -Black pepper -Fresh mint -Lemon juice
#cooking #fishandchips #summer #tennis #yonex

item.title: Friends coming over last minute = ChefвҖҷs Counterв„ў Carne Asa...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Friends coming over last minute = ChefвҖҷs Counterв„ў Carne Asada from ! Their marinated meats allows me to throw together a chef-driven meal in no time. Already marinated and grill-ready, with marinades like Chef's Counterв„ў Carne Asada, Chef's Counterв„ў Lemon Peppercorn Chicken Breast, Chef's Counterв„ў Italian-Style Chicken Breast, Chef's Counterв„ў Mesquite Pork Chop, Chef's Counterв„ў Chimichurri Pork Medallions, Chef's Counterв„ў Balsamic Peppercorn Beef Tips, Chef's Counterв„ў Tangy Orange Chicken Strips, and Chef's Counterв„ў Cilantro Lime Chicken Thigh. Shop ChefвҖҷs Counter at your local Albertsons Companies grocery store, including Albertsons, Safeway, Jewel-Osco, and more!
#ChefsCounterPartner @Albertsons #ChefsCounterInspired #ad

item.title: SUPPLГҢ AL TELEFONO рҹҮ®рҹҮ№ Ingredients For the rice: -Arborio...
item.description:
View on TikTok


SUPPLГҢ AL TELEFONO рҹҮ®рҹҮ№ Ingredients For the rice: -Arborio or Carnaroli rice -Chicken, beef, or vegetable stock (I used chicken) -Tomato passata -Onion -Parmigiano Reggiano -Butter -Salt -Black pepper For the Filling: -Mozzarella or Scamorza For the Breading: -Eggs -Fine breadcrumbs (seasoned with salt) For Frying: -Neutral oil
#cooking #rome #streetfood #italy

item.title: Onion Bhajia рҹ§…рҹҮ®рҹҮі Also known as Pakora! This is now one...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Onion Bhajia рҹ§…рҹҮ®рҹҮі Also known as Pakora! This is now one of my new favorite snacks Ingredients -2 to 3 red onions -1 to 2 tsp salt (for drawing out moisture) plus for seasoning later on -1 cup besan flour (can use chickpea flour) -3 tbs of rice flour -Fresh cilantro -1 to 2 green chiles (Indian green chili or Thai chili are best) -Knob of freshFresh ginger -3 garlic cloves -Cumin seeds -Carom seeds (or fennel seeds) -1 tsp Turmeric powder -ВҪ tsp Kashmiri or red chili powder -1 tsp Ground coriander -1 tsp Garam masala To fry: neutral oil such as sunflower or avocado with a high smoke point Ideally around 340В°F or 171В°C Enjoy!
#cooking #indianfood #snacks #summerrecipes

item.title: PASTA ALLA ZOZZONA Ingredients -Guanciale -Italian sausage -On...
item.description:
View on TikTok


PASTA ALLA ZOZZONA Ingredients -Guanciale -Italian sausage -Onion -Egg yolks -San Marzano tomatoes -Pecorino Romano -Rigatoni or Mezze Maniche -Dry white wine -Salt -Black pepper -Pepperoncino (optional for heat)
#cooking #zozzona #pasta #summer #recipe
